releases.synopsis: This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed.

releases.title: Crepe Master!
releases.synopsis: Crêpe Master! is a beat ‘em up VR adventure where you transform into a magical girl! Become the reincarnation of the Crêpe Goddess, defend your home against an alien invasion, and stop the ruthless tyrant threatening the Earth’s most beloved treat. Saving the world has never been tastier.

releases.title: Crash and Conquer
releases.synopsis: A thrilling, Carmageddon/Twisted metal-inspired roguelite game blending high-octane driving and action with strategic elements.

releases.title: Console Store Simulator
releases.synopsis: Console Store Simulator — Run your own second-hand game shop! Buy and sell games, stock shelves, and grow your business. Watch out for thieves, and explore the black market and flea market — but be careful, some items might be broken!

releases.title: In Trusted Hands
releases.synopsis: Dive into the daily work of a cozy workshop in a big city, accompanied by relaxing atmospheric music. Manage client data, balance energy and stress, and make choices that shape the story and its outcome.

releases.title: Upload Aliens
releases.synopsis: The rule: DON'T LET THEM TOUCH GROUND! Become the Cyberpunk Knight and launch aliens skyward. Use foes as missiles to trigger chain explosions in infinite aerial combos. Unleash this pixel-art roguelite spectacle with just three buttons: Move, Jump, Dash.

releases.title: Genesis
releases.synopsis: Investigate a murder at a lake marked by unexplained events. Play as a journalist trapped in his worst nightmare, explore unsettling locations, and survive a classic horror experience divided into three chapters.

releases.title: Huntdown: Overtime
releases.synopsis: Corporations turned crime-infested streets into profit margins for bounty hunters and John Sawyer is going to make a killing. Hunt, die, upgrade, repeat in this explosive roguelite prequel where every strategic upgrade strips away more flesh and builds a cybernetic fighter one chrome limb at a time.

releases.title: Timber Fever
releases.synopsis: Cut down an infinitely tall Tree and defeat its Protectors. Timber Fever is an action, incremental, roguelike where you create chaos by cutting down the Tree of Life using wacky tools.

releases.title: Dread Neighbor
releases.synopsis: "Dread Neighbor" is a 3D first-person horror game. You are a young woman who moves into a cheap, new apartment to save money. But something is wrong. From the closets, under the bed, through the cracks in the walls—you are being watched. Every corner feels alive with an unseen presence.

releases.title: Wardrum
releases.synopsis: Lead a tribal warband and time your attacks to the beat of the Wardrum in this tactical turn-based roguelite! Forge a path across a harsh fantasy world full of rhythm magic, face death and strengthen your warriors until you have the power to destroy the dark sorcery infecting the lands.

releases.title: Froggy Hates Snow
releases.synopsis: A survival roguelike where a frog digs through freezing snow, uncovers treasures, unlocks upgrades, and battles mystical creatures. Find the escape door or defeat the final boss to survive.

releases.title: Evil Inside VR
releases.synopsis:
Evil Inside VR is not just a simple adaptation to Virtual Reality. It’s a complete reimagining of the original story, rebuilt to deliver a new, deeper, and more terrifying psychological horror experience. With significant changes in gameplay, lighting, sound, and puzzle design, this version completely transforms the way you experience Mark’s nightmare.

This is not the same Evil Inside you remember. It’s a new nightmare.

releases.title: Pax Autocratica
releases.synopsis: In Pax Autocratica, shape a grand colony where every life bends to your will. Feel the weight of absolute power as you decree laws, then lead your squads in roguelite FPS battles from brutal skirmishes to large-scale battlefields and unite the Tyris System under your banner. Wishlist now!

releases.title: Spin Royale

releases.title: The Greenening
releases.synopsis: The Greenening is a short and wholesome incremental journey about exploring and reawakening a forgotten world. Wash away the ashes to discover the secrets hidden beneath, upgrade your versatile watering abilities, and grow your own cozy space garden.

releases.title: The Last Nordic Tribe
releases.synopsis: The Last Nordic Tribe is a RPG with survival elements set at the end of Little Ragnarök(536-539 AD), where 95% of Scandinavia's population perished. Survive the frost, battle hunger, foes, and adversity, exploring a brutal world inspired by the early Middle Ages. Will you rise to the challenge?

releases.title: Stolen Realm Survivors
releases.synopsis: Stolen Realm Survivors is an online co-op survivor-like auto-shooter. Battle hordes of fierce enemies, discover ancient artifacts, merge unique skill trees, and unlock powerful upgrades to survive. Wield the full power of the Stolen Realm. Play solo or with friends against relentless minions!

releases.title: Infinity Sweeper
releases.synopsis: Infinity Sweeper is similar to the classic Minesweeper, but turned into an endless rogue-lite adventure. Navigate through an ever-expanding grid filled with dangerous traps, enemies, and valuable treasures, trying to survive as long as possible.

releases.title: Duck Side of the Moon
releases.synopsis: Waddle and fly as a duck in space! Explore every corner of the galaxy and find curious creatures and materials along the way. Craft gadgets, upgrade your spaceship, and get cozy in this relaxing adventure.

releases.title: Will: Follow the Light
releases.synopsis: Dive into a realistic, single-player, first-person journey through the harsh northern latitudes as you sail endless waters, searching for a way back to your loved ones. Will you follow the light?

releases.title: Alien Strike: Blasting the Intruders
releases.synopsis: The earth has been invaded by aliens, and even though they are still in training, a group of soldiers are trying to save their city while trying to understand why it happened so quickly.

releases.title: Mixtape
releases.synopsis:
On their last night of high school, three friends embark on one more adventure together. Play through a mixtape of memories, set to the soundtrack of a generation.

En route to their final party together, a perfectly-curated playlist draws them into dreamlike reenactments of their formative memories. Experience a variety of narrative vignettes exploring the pivotal moments that shaped them. It's the greatest hits of teenage friendship, from the first kiss to the last dance.

releases.title: Arsonate
releases.synopsis: Outwit the HOST in a death game where fire spreads with each flip of a card. Be the last to burn. Do you fear death?

releases.title: Relic Arena
releases.synopsis: Relic Arena is an 8-player free-to-play autobattler by Dota 2 personalities SUNSfan and Jenkins. Equip heroes with historical relics, that provide unique abilities and upgrades, under the command of legendary historical figures such as Cleopatra and Harambe.

releases.title: Adventurer's Gambit: Dungeons of Fortune
releases.synopsis:
Adventurer's Gambit: Dungeons of Fortune is a fantasy roguelite extraction RPG for PC in which players enter unstable portal dungeons, fight through third-person action encounters, build power during the run, and extract before losing what they found. Each session is built around high-stakes decisions: push deeper for better rewards, or leave early and secure the loot.

Players shape their build as the run unfolds through gear, abilities found during exploration, and stat upgrades discovered in the dungeon. Each player begins with a guaranteed starting ability choice on spawn, while additional abilities can drop from monsters, chests, and destructible objects. Stat upgrades are also found through dungeon interaction, including destructibles such as crates and barrels. The system supports 6 active abilities and 12 passive abilities, letting players assemble aggressive, defensive, utility, or hybrid playstyles from run to run. Up to three players can enter together, creating room for cooperation, tension, and shifting priorities around survival and extraction.

releases.title: TetherGeist
releases.synopsis: TetherGeist is a 2D Precision Platformer about Mae, a young villager with a mysterious illness that has turned her right of passage into a treacherous journey. Join Mae in her struggle to prove herself as you make your way to a mystical temple using powers of astral projection.

releases.title: Alabaster Dawn
releases.synopsis: Break Nyx’s curse and guide humanity's rebirth in this top-down 2.5D Action RPG from the creators of CrossCode. Battle enemies with stylish combos, wield multiple divine weapons, solve intriguing puzzles and explore a changing world.

releases.title: It Lives in the Woods
releases.synopsis: It Lives in the Woods is a first-person psychological horror set in the forests of Canada. You are Ibrahim, a father who has recently lost his daughter whilst on a hiking trip in the forest last winter. You hope to find what happened to your daughter and whether you can reunite with her.

Shining friendship and strong claws! Metal Cardbot W!

After the Speranza incident, humans and Metal Cardbots began to coexist on Earth.
Jun, a boy chosen by the Metal Breath, and his partner Blue Cop discovered a way for humans and Metal Cardbots to coexist.
Then one day, a "Wild Cardbot" appears, holding a 60 million year secret.

Now, a new encounter begins to shake the world.

(Source: Metal Cardbot Wiki)

releases.title: Candy Caries
releases.synopsis:
Ame is a child who loves sweets. But inside her mouth lived a cavity named Caries! Caries calls Ame "Mama" and acts completely unrestrained, using her teeth as furniture and even taking over her body. Ame is constantly being bossed around by Caries.

Ame and Caries—a slightly unusual mother-daughter duo!? A slapstick comedy about their chaotic daily lives!

(Source: Official site, translated)

releases.title: Kujima Utaeba Ie Hororo
releases.synopsis:
In the autumn of his first year of middle school, Arata Kouda meets Kujima, a strange creature that sort-of looks like a bird. Since Kujima is hungry, Arata brings it home with him... But because of his older brother who failed his entrance exams, Kujima gets carried away by the situation and ends up freeloading at the Kouda residence. He says it's just until he makes it through winter, and the warmth of spring comes, but...

(Source: Shogakukan, translated)

releases.title: Nigashita Sakana wa Ookikatta ga Tsuriageta Sakana ga Ookisugita Ken
releases.synopsis:
Maria, the daughter of a duke, grew up believing she would one day inherit her father's dukedom. Accordingly, she focused her attentions on honing her martial arts prowess, while thoughts of marriage fell by the wayside. But the arrival of a baby brother in her family means she's losing her role as heir! Now that she's decided it's time to marry after all, she's arrived a little late to the game! Are there even any eligible bachelors left?

Upon going to study abroad in a neighboring country where she might still stand a chance at getting hitched, she's bewildered when the crown prince there declares before all that his engagement to her is null and void! Wait... what engagement?!

Apparently, he's mistaken her for the wrong girl! But once that's all cleared up and he catches sight of her knocking out a whole pack of bandits, it turns out that this prince may have a thing for ass-kicking young ladies after all.

(Source: Square Enix)

releases.title: Ganbare! Nakamura-kun!!
releases.synopsis:
Okuto Nakamura is a timid and gloomy-looking student who cherishes only two things in this world: his pet octopus and his kind-hearted classmate, Aiki Hirose. Ever since the school entrance ceremony, Nakamura has admired his jovial classmate, albeit from a distance due to his poor social skills. After mustering up all the courage within him, he finally decides to talk to Hirose.

During this first attempt to make contact, an instinctive mistake turns the idea of friendship into a distant dream, as he creates a hilarious impression on his crush. At school, students are expected to cooperate on numerous activities together, meaning Nakamura gets to spend extra time with Hirose. Given these opportunities, can he successfully redeem himself and accomplish his goal of becoming good friends with Hirose?

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

releases.title: Himekishi wa Barbaroi no Yome
releases.synopsis:
"Just kill me!" These are the words of Serafina de Lavillant, the strongest female knight in the West. After being defeated in a war with the East, she has become a prisoner of the barbarians! What awaits the captive Serafina is a life of revenge, torture, and humiliation... or so she thought! What she is offered instead is a marriage to the barbarian king?! An intriguing tale of otherworldly marriage is about to begin!

(Source: Kodansha)

releases.title: Koori no Jouheki
releases.synopsis:
On the surface, high school student Koyuki "Koyun" Hikawa seems unapproachable and terrifying to most other students. In reality, Koyun is just insecure and prone to overthinking due to her uncomfortable experiences in middle school. However, her chance encounter with two boys in school—Minato Amamiya and Youta Hino—sparks a change in her. Like her friend Miki Azumi, the boys are never afraid to approach Koyun and see her for who she really is.

Although Koyun starts spending more time with Miki, Minato, and Youta, she finds herself torn between her newfound bliss and her fear of getting too attached to others. Meanwhile, each of her friends quietly struggles with their own challenges. But as the new friend group continues to navigate high school together, Koyun and the others start to break out of their shells and enjoy their adolescence to the fullest.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
